title: arctium evidens
intro: Arctium evidens, also known as the great burdock, is a biennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its large, coarse leaves and distinctive purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Arctium evidens include reducing skin irritations and conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as aiding in digestive issues like constipation and diarrhea. The herbal preparations of the plant include tea, tincture, and salve, which can be made from the roots, leaves, and flowers of the plant.
